To connect your Umami instance:\n\n**Sel:
To connect your Umami instance:

**Self-hosted**: Enter your server URL, username and password (the same credentials you use to log in to your Umami dashboard).

**Umami Cloud**: Enter your server URL (`https://cloud.umami.is`) and your API key (found in **Settings > API Keys**).
Your Umami server URL (e.g. https://clou: Your Umami server URL (e.g. https://cloud.umami.is or your self-hosted URL). Do not include a trailing slash.
Choose how to authenticate with your Uma: Choose how to authenticate with your Umami instance.
Get summarized website statistics (visit: Get summarized website statistics (visitors, pageviews, bounces, visit duration) for a date range.
Get metrics (URLs, referrers, browsers,: Get metrics (URLs, referrers, browsers, OS, countries, etc.) for a website over a date range.
The type of metric to retrieve.
Maximum number of results to return.
Get the number of currently active visit: Get the number of currently active visitors on a website.
Get pageview and session count time seri: Get pageview and session count time series for a website over a date range.
The time grouping for the data.
IANA timezone for time-series bucketing: IANA timezone for time-series bucketing (e.g. "Europe/Paris", "America/New_York"). Defaults to UTC.
Send a custom event or pageview to Umami: Send a custom event or pageview to Umami. This uses the public tracking endpoint (no authentication required by the API, but uses your server URL).
The URL path of the page (e.g. \"/pricin: The URL path of the page (e.g. "/pricing").
Name of the custom event (e.g. \"signup-: Name of the custom event (e.g. "signup-button-click"). Leave empty to track a simple pageview.
Additional key-value data to attach to t: Additional key-value data to attach to the event.
List all websites tracked in your Umami: List all websites tracked in your Umami account.
Maximum number of websites to return.
Triggers when traffic from a new referri: Triggers when traffic from a new referring domain is detected for the first time.
